summary: Iteration 4 — story-sticker share-card variant (1080x1920) and pick_excerpt pytest suite validated. All 39 backend tests pass (21 pick_excerpt + 10 testimonial regression + 8 new story variant). Frontend story button flow works end-to-end on the external preview URL: the new open-share-story CTA is present on /result WITHOUT needing a deep reading, clicking it POSTs variant='story' WITHOUT reading_excerpt, the modal shows the 1080x1920 image, and repeat clicks reuse the cached data URI without a re-fetch. Data and testimonial variants remain functional with proper caching.
critical_code_review_comments: share_cards.py now at ~460 lines — still under the 700-line soft cap; future shared layout primitives (centered text, chip row) could be extracted but no action required.

Cache keying in result.tsx uses only variant, not (variant, lang). Switching EN↔FR AFTER a variant was cached will reuse the wrong-language PNG. Currently masked because LangToggle is not exercised between opens, but worth a future fix (include lang in cache key).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/ --tb=short -q. External URL for integration: https://312be495-c3b7-43d1-a120-a03d9834ea47.preview.emergentagent.com. Frontend testIDs for share cards on /result: open-share-card (data), open-share-reading (testimonial, only visible after AI reading), open-share-story (story, always visible). Modal: share-card-modal / share-card-image / download-share-card / close-share-card. Story POST must NOT include reading_excerpt; default data variant works without variant field. Cache is keyed on variant only (see code review note above).
